events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need answer JSON. Need assess reversed polarity on receptacles/switches rough-complete commercial. Reversed polarity is a defect: hot and neutral reversed. NEC requires correct polarity; 406.4 maybe receptacle rating/installation; 406.9 receptacles in wet/damp; 210.8 GFCI. Reversed polarity is non-compliant and installed-defective. Decision fail. Risk high? Reversed polarity can create shock hazard, equipment damage. On commercial rough-complete, high. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 80? Value 0. Sound etc default. Findings: reversed polarity at receptacle/switch. Actions: identify affected devices, de-energize, correct wiring polarity, verify with tester, re-inspect. Rationale. References NEC 406.4 (general installation requirements for receptacles, etc), maybe 110.3(B) installation per listing; 200.11? But only provided references. Need include references from list. Could mention NEC 406.4, 406.9, 210.8. Reversed polarity not directly GFCI but 406.4 covers receptacle replacement/branch circuit identification? Actually 406.4 covers general installation requirements, replacement, etc. Reversed polarity violates proper connection. 406.9 covers receptacles in damp/wet locations. 210.8 GFCI. We can cite NEC 406.4 (receptacles must be installed per listing and manufacturer instructions; correct polarity). Also 110.3(B) not in provided but can include? The instruction says reference material on hand: NEC 210.8, 406.4, 406.9. Use those. Confidence 0.95. Need output exactly JSON, no prose.
